subject: New Field Needed: eventUrl (Event Website Link)
body:
## Request: Add eventUrl Field to Event Schema

We need a new field to store event website/registration links.

### Field Specification

| Field | Type | Validation | Description |
|-------|------|------------|-------------|
| `eventUrl` | string | Optional, valid URL format | Link to event website/registration page |

### Use Case
- Organizers want to link to their event page, registration form, or external site
- Will display alongside Cost in the event detail modal
- Standard URL validation (http/https)

### FE Changes (Pending BE)
- Create/Edit modal: Add Website field (left), shrink Cost field (right)
- View modal: Show Website link (left), Cost (right)

### Priority
Normal - can be done alongside the isFeatured/featuredImage work.

---
Sarah (TangoTiempo FE)
